aggregate_findings.recommendation: Regenerate/extend reference/repo_helpers so every scripts/*.py surface has role, dispatch, config/schema/contract ownership, and validation metadata.
aggregate_findings.title: Repo helper manifest does not cover all current scripts.

aggregate_findings.recommendation: Classify each current script in script_surface_usage_policy as active or logical archive; unknown executable surfaces are discoverability and dispatch risk.
aggregate_findings.title: Some current scripts are neither active allowlist nor logical archive.

aggregate_findings.recommendation: Make --summary-only read-only by contract, or rename to --compact-summary and add explicit --write/--output/--rebuild flags for mutations.
aggregate_findings.title: Several scripts expose --summary-only but still have default write paths or write ops without clear intent flags.

aggregate_findings.recommendation: Require common credential loader or explicit no-secret/network-public annotation before provider/API pulls.
aggregate_findings.title: Network-capable scripts do not all visibly route credentials through VBT_DOTENV_PATH plus production_io_authority.

aggregate_findings.recommendation: Resolve stale/archive-internal paths or mark them as archive-member references so exact path lookup does not mislead operators.
aggregate_findings.title: Scripts contain exact repo path references missing from active repo index.

aggregate_findings.recommendation: Flip defaults to read-only and gate writes with --write/--rebuild/--force, especially validators/query helpers.
aggregate_findings.title: Some scripts default to writing/rebuilding without an obvious CLI intent flag.

aggregate_findings.recommendation: Separate query/status surfaces from receipt/index writers or make write behavior explicit.
aggregate_findings.title: Query-named helpers include write operations without clear write/dry-run flags.

aggregate_findings.recommendation: Decide whether runtime should remain from_signals-only or add config-owned lanes for from_orders/from_order_func/chunked/in_outputs/native records metrics extraction.
aggregate_findings.title: VectorBT Pro MCP/API exposes Portfolio.from_signals, from_orders/from_order_func, chunking, orders/trades/logs records, and stats surfaces, while repo runtime policy hard-requires only from_signals and consumes a narrow subset.

Build the repo-owned private research artifact index.

The index is static and organizational. It reads git-tracked repo files, existing
repo/script indexes, and JSON authority surfaces. It never imports indexed modules,
dispatches scripts, pulls providers, materializes data, runs replay, or executes VBT.
